miniPlayerSmokePrereq0: An active yt-dlp download or ffmpeg export is running (progress in the main window).
miniPlayerSmokePrereq1: Bundled ffmpeg/yt-dlp on PATH (Settings → Dependencies → doctor OK).
miniPlayerSmokeStep_open: Service → “Mini Player (task progress)…” or when closing main while busy — “Mini Player”.
miniPlayerSmokeStep_progress: Plaque shows %/speed (yt-dlp and ffmpeg); progress bar updates.
miniPlayerSmokeStep_context_menu: RMB on plaque → Always on top (✓), Restore main window, Close mini player.
miniPlayerSmokeStep_session: Move/resize window; `app-data/session.json` persists bounds and alwaysOnTop.
miniPlayerSmokePass0: Main window hidden (not quit); tasks keep running; restore main refocuses.
miniPlayerSmokePass2: Support ZIP ownerManualSmoke: Mini Player §4.3 block.
